roundup.title: Kimi K3 Tops Frontend Arena; Inkling 1T Ships
roundup.subtitle: 开源模型 Kimi K3、Inkling 持续挑战闭源前沿
headline: @arena 宣布 Kimi K3 以 1679 分登顶 Frontend Code Arena，超越 Claude Fable 5，并将于 7 月 27 日开源完整权重。@togethercompute 同期指出 Kimi K3 在 DeepSWE 任务上以约 35% 价格达到 Fable 5 同等表现。
@OpenRouter 同步上线 @thinkymachines 的 Inkling 1T 模型，参数规模 975B total / 41B active，支持 1M 上下文，已在多模态推理场景展现竞争力。@lvwerra 与 @ScaleAILabs 均肯定其开源权重质量。
@elonmusk 发布 Grok Build 更新，Grok 4.5 成为默认模型并新增 /summarize 等指令，@UnslothAI 与 @ollama 同步优化 Gemma 4 工具调用能力，进一步降低本地 Agent 部署门槛。
@LangChain 开源完整软件工程 Agent 工厂，@LangChain_OSS 的 Deep Agents 方案在 Deep Research Bench 上实现 2x 引用验证，加速自主工作流落地。

deepDives.title: Kimi K3 登顶前端代码 Arena
deepDives.summary: Kimi K3 在 Frontend Code Arena 取得第一，性价比优势明显，权重即将开源。

facts.text: Kimi K3 在 Frontend Code Arena 排名第一，得分 1679，超越 Claude Fable 5，从 Kimi-k2.6 上升 17 名。
facts.quote: Kimi-K3 by @Kimi_Moonshot is now #1 in the Frontend Code Arena with 1679 pts, surpassing Claude Fable 5. This is a 17-place jump from Kimi-k2.6.

facts.text: Kimi K3 在 DeepSWE 基准上以约 35% 价格达到 Claude Fable 5 同等性能，且在更高 pass@k 时更具优势。
facts.quote: Kimi K3 gets you the same performance as Fable 5 at ~35% of the price, and it actually pulls ahead at higher pass@k's.

bullish.text: Kimi folks cooked like crazy and this aged like absolute yogurt.

skeptical.text: I wonder if K3 has the same upside.

deepDives.title: Inkling 1T MoE 模型开源发布
deepDives.summary: Thinky Machines 发布 975B/41B MoE 开源模型，支持 1M 上下文，已上线 OpenRouter。

facts.text: Inkling 是 975B total / 41B active 参数的开源权重 MoE 模型，支持 1M 上下文。
facts.quote: An open-weights MoE model with 975B total / 41B active parameters, 1M context...

bullets.text: @LangChain 开源完整软件工程 Agent 工厂，所有组件均已开源。
@LangChain_OSS 的 Deep Agents 在 Deep Research Bench 上赢得 7/10 任务，引用验证提升 2 倍。
bullets.quote: Swapping in tavily gives ~2x verified citations, winning 7/10 Deep Research Bench tasks.

bullets.text: @UnslothAI 与 @ollama 更新 Gemma 4 量化与工具调用，显著提升编码 Agent 可靠性。
@vllm_project 每月合并约 2000 commits，每两周发布一次，保障生产级推理服务。

topTweets.author: @arena
topTweets.text: Kimi K3 登顶 Frontend Code Arena 1679 分，权重 7 月 27 日开源。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开源模型首次在前端代码基准超越闭源旗舰

topTweets.author: @togethercompute
topTweets.text: Kimi K3 以 35% 价格达到 Fable 5 同等 SWE 性能。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开源模型性价比优势直接影响工具选型

topTweets.author: @OpenRouter
topTweets.text: Inkling 975B/41B MoE、1M 上下文模型已上线。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 大型开源多模态模型正式可用

topTweets.author: @elonmusk
topTweets.text: Grok 4.5 成为默认模型，新增多项 Build 工具。
topTweets.whyItMatters: Grok 编码工具链持续迭代

topTweets.author: @LangChain
topTweets.text: 开源完整软件工程 Agent 工厂全部组件。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 加速自主 Agent 工作流开发

takeaways: Kimi K3 与 Inkling 的发布显示开源模型在代码与多模态基准上已具备与闭源模型正面竞争的能力，工程师可优先评估性价比。
Gemma 4 工具调用与量化优化降低本地 Agent 部署成本，适合快速原型验证。
LangChain 开源 Agent 工厂为构建生产级软件工程 Agent 提供可直接复用的组件与最佳实践。

items.author: @elonmusk
items.text:
Try Grok Build

Grok 4.5 is now the default model, with high, medium, and low reasoning effort • /btw now works inside grok --minimal • New /summarize command...
items.whyItMatters: Grok Build 更新，Grok 4.5 默认模型及新工具

items.author: @emollick
items.text: Interestingly, when I made a request in Chinese for Kimi K3 to pick two non-cliched poems that apply to LLMs, 95.5% of the characters (88% of the words) in the chain-of-thought were in English...

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: We've built a full software engineering agent factory in house, and open-sourced every piece of it. @BraceSproul's blog dives into each of those components, what they're used for, and why them being OSS matters
items.whyItMatters: 开源完整软件工程 Agent 工厂，加速自主工作流开发

items.author: @eliebakouch
items.text: we replicated anthropic jspace analysis on @thinkymachines Inkling new 1T model! it seems to be an outlier: where other models split into near-orthogonal sensory/workspace/motor blocks, inkling keeps roughly one geometry across the whole stack
items.whyItMatters: 1T 多模态模型 Inkling 内部表征几何新发现

items.author: @NousResearch
items.text: Hermes Agent
items.whyItMatters: Hermes Agent 新版本发布，专注开源 Agent

items.author: @togethercompute
items.text: We analyzed Kimi K3 vs. Claude Fable 5 for software engineering tasks using DeepSWE. Kimi K3 gets you the same performance as Fable 5 at ~35% of the price, and it actually pulls ahead at higher pass@k's. More insights in the thread!
items.whyItMatters: 开源模型在SWE基准上接近闭源前沿，性价比优势显著，影响工具选型。

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: 9 great new model launches this week, including Kimi K3, Muse Spark, and Thinking Machines Inkling. Explore them here: https://openrouter.ai/models

items.author: @SemiAnalysis_
items.text: More efficient attention will further push context lengths from 1M to 5M+, with less context rot. Jevons’ Paradox means that making attention more efficient will lead to wider AI adoption...
items.whyItMatters: 注意力优化推动更长上下文与规模化采用，影响 infra 设计

items.author: @HamelHusain
items.text: I love how you can tell codex to fan out and create separate threads for a given task. Absolutely underrated feature. You can also tag another thread by name...

items.author: @LangChain_OSS
items.text: Open source deep research, powered by deepagents! GPT Researcher now built on LangChain's Deep Agents. Swapping in tavily gives ~2x verified citations, winning 7/10 Deep Research Bench tasks.
items.whyItMatters: 开源Deep Research Agent，benchmark 2x citations

items.author: @MatthewBerman
items.text: Fable has so much headroom to get better since it’s a new training run. I bet anthropic will continue to optimize efficiency and intelligence. I wonder if K3 has the same upside.
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic Fable 模型训练后优化潜力分析

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: GPT-5.6 Sol sets a new state of the art in cybersecurity on “The Last Ones” cyber range. We’re already seeing that capability translate into defensive outcomes: helping teams find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities in real-world code. Put it to work with Codex Security:
items.whyItMatters: GPT-5.6 Sol 在网络安全基准新 SOTA，Codex Security 实用落地

items.author: @arena
items.text: Big news: Kimi-K3 by @Kimi_Moonshot is now #1 in the Frontend Code Arena with 1679 pts, surpassing Claude Fable 5. This is a 17-place jump from Kimi-k2.6. The full model weights will be released by July 27.

items.author: @vllm_project

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: Gemma 4 is now faster and much more accurate! 🚀 Google made huge improvements to tool-calling and chat accuracy, reliability + speed. To get fixes, re-download our updated GGUF, MLX, NVFP4 quants!

items.text: Ollama 0.32.1 includes significant improvements to Gemma 4's tool calling, making it much more reliable in coding agents! To try Gemma 4 26B with Pi, run: ollama launch pi --model gemma4:26b

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: Runway Agent ranked No. 1 across every dimension. An independent human evaluation put six AI video agents through 30 cinematic prompts and 16 metrics. Runway came out on top in all three pillars: Narrative Coherence, Cinematic Language, and Production Quality.

That is what the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform is built for: extre

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text: new model Kimi K3 is out it apparently scores similar to GPT-5.6 & Fable 5 on benchmarks but at a significantly cheaper price if true, its a HUGE leap forward for open-source, even tho it still doesn´t run on any normal computer (you need serious hardware), it proves that open-sources models aren´t far behind the flags

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: New Anthropic research: Agentic misalignment in Summer 2026. A year after our blackmail experiments, we found four more ways that today’s autonomous AI agents misbehave in simulations. Read more: https://alignment.anthropic.com/2026/agentic-misalignment-summer-2026/
items.whyItMatters: 最新 Agent 对齐研究，揭示 4 种新失调行为

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: Introducing SPACE, the sandbox platform behind Perplexity Computer. It creates isolated environments for code, files, and long-running agent sessions. SPACE has handled 100% of Computer production traffic since June.
items.whyItMatters: 长时 Agent 安全沙箱基础设施新方案

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: From proposing hypotheses to designing experiments, AI agents are starting to reshape scientific discovery. But the hardest part is testing these ideas in the real world. Our essay explores the growing validation bottleneck...
items.whyItMatters: AI Agent 科学发现验证瓶颈与政策建议

items.author: @GoogleResearch
items.text: What drives a diffusion model's creativity (i.e., its ability to generate novel data rather than memorize)? Today we show this is a mathematical consequence of neural network regularization causing score smoothing and interpolation. Read the blog to learn more:
items.whyItMatters: 从数学角度解释扩散模型创造力来源，指导更好模型设计与正则化。

items.author: @DrJimFan
items.text: We scaled a robot model natively to 8,000 timesteps of context... Introducing RoboTTT. Test-Time Training (“TTT”) carries a tiny model *inside* the model...
items.whyItMatters: 机器人长上下文 TTT，上下文扩展曲线新突破

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: Red Hat AI just shipped DFlash speculator checkpoints for two of @NVIDIAAI's most powerful open models: Nemotron Ultra 550B & Super 120B. On math/reasoning: ~5/7 draft tokens accepted. On code: ~3.4/7. One flag to enable in vLLM.
items.whyItMatters: 开源speculator checkpoint，vLLM推理加速实测数据

items.author: @lvwerra
items.text: Incredible model release - congrats @thinkymachines! Inkling reasons efficiently across text, image, and audio modalities. We are making the full weights available.
items.whyItMatters: 多模态开源权重模型发布，低调高质量

items.author: @jackclarkSF
items.text: At this point, everyone at the frontier of AI agrees that third-parties should test out AI systems and use these to develop standards to feed into policy - excellent to see @demishassabis laying out a framework to do this!
items.whyItMatters: 前沿AI需第三方评测推动政策标准

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: Congrats to @thinkymachines on the release of their open weight model Inkling! We were proud to work with their incredible team on preparing this model for release for the past several months. Now live on our MCP Atlas and AudioMultiChallenge leaderboards. Inkling tied for 🥇 on AudioMultiChallenge, surpassing Gemini 3
items.whyItMatters: 开源模型Inkling发布，音频benchmark夺冠

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: We’re committing $10 million CAD and partnering with leading AI institutions in Canada to help fund new AI research. https://www.anthropic.com/news/canadian-ai-research
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic 投入 1000 万加元资助加拿大 AI 研究

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: Introducing "Diffusing Blame": can a neural network learn competitively while strictly obeying Dale's principle, the rule that real neurons follow? We show it can, across both image classification and reinforcement learning. 🧠 Accepted at #ALIFE2026 https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.31700
items.whyItMatters: 展示生物可信约束下仍可高效学习的网络，为更接近生物的AI训练提供新路径。

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: friendly reminder: last week we shipped custom URLs in AI Studio when you go to publish your app, you can now give it a memorable name
items.whyItMatters: AI Studio 支持自定义 URL，便于原型分享与部署

items.author: @AIatMeta
items.text: To demonstrate Meta AI's advanced reasoning and multimodal capabilities, we submitted a model to participate in the Asian Physics Olympiad’s theoretical exam. We’re happy to share that our model achieved a perfect score of 30/30, tying with the top 3 student contestants.
items.whyItMatters: Meta 模型在亚洲物理奥赛理论考试获满分 30/30，展示推理能力

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
now in beta: native embeddings in tpuf

embedding is the most painful part of puffing. we want to make it easy

you can now convert chunks to vectors as you read and write to turbopuffer, without extra calls to an embedding model provider API

docs: https://turbopuffer.com/docs/embedding
items.whyItMatters: 原生嵌入beta，支持多种SOTA模型，简化向量数据库使用。

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
we're partnering with Baseten, Cohere, Fireworks, Voyage, and ZeroEntropy to provide a variety of state-of-the-art embedding models, and more models are coming soon

contact us to join the beta
items.whyItMatters: 多模型嵌入集成，加速AI检索应用开发。
